meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Solve Founder's Block Today
content.seo_description: Stop stalling. Use our Antigravity project template and Claude Code to launch your MVP fast. A high-impact guide for founders to overcome project paralysis.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template acts as an architectural blueprint for your MVP. By pairing it with Claude Code, you eliminate boilerplate, automate infrastructure setup, and focus purely on market-validated features. This workflow allows you to move from ideation to a deployable, revenue-generating SaaS product in record time.
content.intro:
You stare at a blank IDE, the cursor blinking with rhythmic indifference. You have the ambition and the capital, but the 'what' remains a phantom, buried under the weight of analysis paralysis. Every minute spent debating architecture is a minute lost to competitors who are already capturing your market share.

The Antigravity project template isn't just code; it’s a velocity multiplier. By standardizing your stack and leveraging the autonomous capabilities of Claude Code, you transform from a struggling tinkerer into a high-leverage founder. We are stripping away the complexity so you can start shipping features that actually solve customer problems and drive MRR.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Initialize your project using the Antigravity template to establish a production-ready folder structure and dependency tree.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project using the Antigravity standard template, including Auth, Stripe integration, and PostgreSQL setup.

steps.title: Define Domain Models
steps.description: Translate your business requirements into schema models to ensure data integrity from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create database models for a SaaS subscription service, including users, subscriptions, and usage_logs using Prisma.

steps.title: Implement Business Logic
steps.description: Develop the core value proposition by injecting domain-specific logic into the boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a service layer function that calculates user credits based on subscription tiers defined in the database.

steps.title: Configure Auth & Security
steps.description: Lock down your application with pre-configured authentication flows to protect user data.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure secure session management and role-based access control (RBAC) within the existing Next.js framework.

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Automate the CI/CD pipeline to ensure your MVP hits the market without manual overhead.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and deployment to Vercel.

pro_tips: Always define your 'Success Metrics' in a README.md before letting Claude Code write a single line of implementation logic.
Use Antigravity's 'ghost-mode' to generate unit tests alongside your code to maintain 90%+ coverage automatically.
Never hardcode environment variables; use the template's secure vault integration to manage secrets during the build phase.
If Claude Code struggles with complexity, break the task into smaller atomic functions rather than asking for the entire feature set.
Audit your dependencies weekly using the Antigravity CLI to prune unused packages and keep your SaaS lean for faster load times.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, begin the 'Feedback Loop' phase: integrate a feedback widget, capture user emails, and iterate on your core value proposition using the same Antigravity workflow.
content.conversion_block: Don't let another day pass building nothing. Your market is waiting for a solution, and the tools to build it are at your fingertips. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
